video_title: TITAN: The OceanGate Submersible Disaster | Official Trailer | Netflix
reply_text:
There are a lot of exclusive shots in the film. What are the shots of Stockton's first dive to 4000 meters worth, where the hull is cracking at a depth, and he himself almost shits his pants from fear inside. When we hear a real cracking of the hull for the first time, there were no such videos before, I rewound that moment, watched it 5 times. It is simply incomprehensible to the mind how he voluntarily sat down in this trough, after all the test models failed, some not even reaching the pressure equivalent to a depth of 4000 meters. By the way, there are also videos from the tests, where they show how the prototypes explode, we have not seen them before either.

And also the shots when Stockton took over the piloting from Lockridge, and crashed into the remains of another ship at a lower depth, this is where the discord in their relationship began.

And a lot of other little things, I can't remember offhand. It seems to me that these exclusive videos are equivalent to "new information".
